briefs.title: Approved Screening Device and Motor Vehicle Act Regulations Amended — Effective February 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC amended the Approved Screening Device Regulation and Motor Vehicle Act Regulations effective February 1, 2026, updating provisions under the Motor Vehicle Act related to screening devices and vehicle rules.
briefs.action_required: Review the amended Approved Screening Device Regulation and Motor Vehicle Act Regulations to ensure your operations remain compliant.
